relationship: Local Initiative Medi-Cal managed care plan serving Riverside and San Bernardino Counties (the Inland Empire).
memberServicesHours: Member Services: Monday-Friday, 8 a.m. to 5 p.m. The 24-hour Nurse Advice Line and after-hours help are available 24/7.
notes: Member Services main line 1-800-440-4347 (1-800-440-IEHP) was verified on the official IEHP Medi-Cal site; TTY is 1-800-718-4347 (or 711). The 24-hour Nurse Advice Line is a DIFFERENT number, 1-888-244-4347 (1-888-244-IEHP). Dental for most members is handled by the separate state Medi-Cal Dental program (1-800-322-6384), and pharmacy by the state Medi-Cal Rx program (1-800-977-2273), not IEHP. Grievance fax: (909) 890-5748.

resources.title: Find a Doctor or Clinic
resources.description: Use IEHP's online search tool to find a doctor, clinic, hospital, pharmacy, or specialist that takes your IEHP Medi-Cal plan. You can search near your home and pick a doctor (your PCP) for your care. Need help? Call Member Services.
resources.languages: Website and Member Services help available in English, Spanish, Chinese, Vietnamese, and other languages; free interpreters available.

resources.title: Free Rides to Medical Visits (NEMT)
resources.description: If you have no way to get to a covered medical visit, IEHP gives you free, round-trip rides. This includes rides by car, van, or even wheelchair van or ambulance if your health needs it. Call to set up a ride, ideally a few days ahead.
resources.languages: Free interpreter help by phone in your language; TTY 1-800-718-4347 or 711.

resources.title: Rides and Bus Passes for Health Needs (NMT)
resources.description: IEHP also helps you get to health-related places like the pharmacy to pick up medicine or to a WIC office. You can get a bus pass, gas help, or a ride. Ask Member Services or call the ride line for a bus pass.
resources.languages: Free interpreter help available; TTY 1-800-718-4347 or 711.

resources.title: 24-Hour Nurse Advice Line
resources.description: Not sure if you should see a doctor or go to the ER? Call any time, day or night. A nurse will listen, give you advice, and help you decide where to get care. This line is open 24 hours a day, 7 days a week.

resources.title: Mental Health and Substance Use Care
resources.description: You can get help for stress, sadness, anxiety, or drug and alcohol use. You can see a therapist for counseling without a referral, and get medication help if needed. Call Member Services and ask for behavioral health services.

resources.title: Prescriptions through Medi-Cal Rx
resources.description: Your medicines are covered by the state's Medi-Cal Rx program, not IEHP. Show your BIC (Medi-Cal) card at the pharmacy. To check if a drug is covered or find a pharmacy, call Medi-Cal Rx or visit their website. IEHP can also help.
resources.languages: Help available in many languages; TTY 1-800-977-2273 (press 5) or 711.

resources.title: Dental Care (Medi-Cal Dental / Denti-Cal)
resources.description: Your dental care comes from the state's Medi-Cal Dental program, not IEHP. It covers cleanings, exams, fillings, and more. Call to find a dentist who takes Medi-Cal Dental or to ask about your benefits.
resources.languages: Help and interpreters available in many languages; TTY 1-800-735-2922.

resources.title: Vision and Eye Care
resources.description: Your IEHP Medi-Cal plan covers a routine eye exam and a pair of eyeglasses (frames and lenses). Call Member Services to find an eye doctor or learn what your vision benefit covers.

resources.title: Free Interpreter and Language Help
resources.description: You have the right to free help in your language, including sign language. IEHP gives you a free interpreter by phone or in person at your doctor visits, 24 hours a day. Try to ask at least 5 days before your visit. You can also get written papers in your language.
resources.languages: Oral interpretation available 24/7 in any language at no cost; TTY 1-800-718-4347 or 711.

resources.title: Member ID Card and Online Account
resources.description: Lost your IEHP card or need a new one? Call Member Services to ask for a replacement. You can also sign up for the IEHP online member portal to see your card, pick a doctor, and manage your plan.

resources.title: Renew Your Medi-Cal Every Year
resources.description: You must renew your Medi-Cal once a year to keep it. Watch your mail for a renewal packet and send it back on time. Renew online at BenefitsCal.com or call your county. Keep your address and phone number up to date so you don't miss notices. Riverside County: 1-877-410-8827. San Bernardino County: 1-877-410-8829.

resources.title: File a Complaint or Appeal
resources.description: If you are unhappy with your care or IEHP says no to a service you want, you can speak up. File a complaint (grievance) or appeal a decision. Call Member Services, and they will help you. You can also fax your complaint. There is no cost and it will not hurt your care.
resources.languages: Free interpreters available; TTY 1-800-718-4347. Grievance fax: (909) 890-5748.

resources.title: Extra Help: Care Management and Community Supports
resources.description: If you have complex needs, IEHP can give you a care team to help manage all your care (Enhanced Care Management). You may also get extra services like help finding housing, healthy food/meals, or other support. Call to see if you qualify.
resources.languages: Care teams can help by phone or in person; free interpreters available; TTY 1-800-718-4347.

resources.title: Urgent Care and After-Hours Help
resources.description: For a problem that needs care soon but is not life-threatening, go to an urgent care clinic or call the 24-Hour Nurse Advice Line for advice any time. For a true emergency, call 911 or go to the nearest ER.

resources.title: Member Handbook and Forms
resources.description: Your Member Handbook (also called the Evidence of Coverage) explains all your benefits and rights in plain language. You can read it online or call to have a copy mailed to you for free in your language.
resources.languages: Available in English, Spanish, Chinese, Vietnamese, and other languages; large print and other formats on request.
